projectDescription: Offline reverse geocoding library for Indonesia with support for province, regency, district, and village-level administrative data
keyFeatures: Offline reverse geocoding without internet connection
Fast spatial indexing with O(log n) queries
Support for all Indonesian administrative levels (province, regency, district, village)
Dual-use as both Go library and CLI tool
publicApiSurface: New(dbPath) - Initialize geocoder with custom database path
ReverseGeocode(lat, lon) - Convert coordinates to full address
ReverseGeocodeLevel(lat, lon, level) - Query specific administrative level
Result - Result structure with Province, Regency, District, Village
Location - Location structure with Code and Name
Level - Administrative level constants (Province, Regency, District, Village)
